parameters.query:
INSERT INTO recordings (title, category, recorded_date, filename)
VALUES ('{{ $json.title }}', '{{ $json.category }}', '{{ $json.recorded_date }}'::date, '{{ $json.filename }}')
ON CONFLICT (filename) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title
RETURNING id

WITH inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO transcripts (recording_id, full_text, assemblyai_job_id)
  VALUES ('{{ $json.recording_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.transcript_text }}', NULLIF('{{ $json.assemblyai_job_id }}', ''))
  ON CONFLICT (recording_id) DO UPDATE SET full_text = EXCLUDED.full_text
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT i.id,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('name', name, 'category', category)) FROM training_topics) AS existing_topics
FROM inserted i

VALUES ('{{ $json.title }}', '{{ $json.category }}', '{{ $json.recorded_date }}'::date, '{{ $json.filename }}')
ON CONFLICT (filename) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title
RETURNING id

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ audio_url: $json.file_url, speaker_labels: true, speech_model: 'nano', webhook_url: $execution.resumeUrl }) }}
